context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

Give me the required direct-export environment variables for sending OpenTelemetry traces from a Go service to Coralogix in eu2.

checklist.name: no-if-it-uses-eu2-coralogix-com-443-without-t
checklist.description: Shows all required env vars: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT using the gRPC endpoint ingress.eu2.coralogix.com:443, OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS with Authorization=Bearer, OTEL_SERVICE_NAME, and OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES containing cx.application.name and cx.subsystem.name. FAIL if it uses eu2.coralogix.com:443 without the ingress prefix.
